manifest.description: A plugin to help you display cards based on sequence.
manifest.name: Canvas Presentation

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Include full Mark Command for readability by @bramses in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-Presentation/pull/5
* feat: support next/previous group by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-Presentation/pull/6
* Feat/support previous group and next by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-Presentation/pull/13

## New Contributors
* @bramses made their first contribution in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-Presentation/pull/5

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Canvas-Presentation/compare/0.0.2...0.0.3
